mission.title: cert-manager: Istio VirtualService for HTTP01 solving (rebased)
mission.description:
**This PR is based on this older WIP PR #3011** -> great progress was made here, but PR seems to be stale

**What this PR does / why we need it:**
Add support for routing ACME HTTP01 challenges using Istio VirtualService CRs.

**Which issue this PR fixes:**
fixes #1636 and fixes #2526

```release-note
Add support for routing ACME HTTP01 challenges using Istio VirtualService CRs.
```

resolution.summary:
**What this PR does / why we need it**:
Add support for routing ACME HTTP01 challenges using Istio VirtualService CRs.

**Which issue this PR fixes**:
fixes #1636

**Special notes for your reviewer**:
This is a PoC. Outstanding TODOs off the top of my head:
- [x] add unit tests
- [ ] add e2e test
- [ ] support cert-manager installation without Istio CRDs
- [ ] add docs to Issuer CRD
- [ ] re-enable Ingress based challenge routing

**Release note**:

```release-note
```
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
